message:
refactor(actor): implement Clone for ActorRef without M: Clone bound

Fixes an unnecessary trait bound that prevented cloning ActorRef<M>
when M (the message type) was not Clone:

- Remove #[derive(Clone)] from ActorRef
- Add manual Clone impl that clones each field independently:
  - actor_id: Copy
  - sender: mpsc::Sender<M> is Clone regardless of M
  - state: Arc<_> is always Clone

Also reorganizes ActorContext methods:
- Add #[allow(clippy::elidable_lifetime_names)] for explicit lifetime
- Move self_ref() method to group with other accessor methods
- Update doc comment to clarify ActorRef<M> is always Clone

This allows ActorRef to be freely cloned and shared between tasks
even when the message type contains non-Clone data like oneshot senders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
